home.warning_data: Data not loaded yet. Please wait...
home.feat_search_desc: Explore the full library with advanced filters.
home.feat_reco_desc: Discover books using our hybrid algorithm (Collaborative + Content).
home.feat_dashboard_desc: Visualize statistics and trends with interactive charts.
home.feat_agent_desc: Query the virtual assistant in natural language about our catalog.
home.surprise_desc: Let chance decide for you. Click the button to get a random suggestion from our cultural database.

agent.warning_load: ⚠️ Please visit the home page first to load the data.
agent.hero_subtitle: Query the database in natural language.
agent.llm_connected: ✅ **LLM Connected**: The assistant is using the NVIDIA Llama 3.3 model. Ask any question about the books or data.
agent.offline_mode: ⚠️ **Offline Mode**: API key not configured. The assistant uses limited static rules (Fallback).
agent.sug_3: Explain how the recommendation algorithm works.
agent.rate_limit_error: ⏳ **Rate Limit**: You have exceeded the message limit per minute. Please wait.
agent.empty_chat: The conversation is empty. Ask a question to start!
agent.length_error: ⚠️ **Error**: Your message exceeds the allowed limit.
agent.privacy: 🔒 Security & Privacy: Questions asked via this chat are temporarily sent to the NVIDIA Build API if the key is configured. No personal data is permanently stored. Usage is subject to a rate limit to prevent abuse. Without an API key, the chat works in 100% private local mode.
agent.no_docs_rag_warning: ⚠️ No documents are indexed. Go to the Library page to import PDFs in order to use semantic search.
agent.no_docs_error: Please index documents first before using RAG mode.
agent.voice_search_desc: Speak into your microphone to dictate your question. (Click below to simulate voice recording)

agent_fallback.header:
⚠️ **Offline Mode**

*NVIDIA API key not configured. Rule-based responses.*

---
agent_fallback.recommend_default: 📚 Use the **⭐ Recommendations** tab to get personalized suggestions. You can also mention a book title in your question.
agent_fallback.explain:
🔬 **The BookLens Hybrid Model**

The system combines two approaches:

1. **Collaborative Filtering**: Compares books based on readers' ratings.
2. **Content Similarity**: Compares metadata (author, theme) via TF-IDF.

Users can also provide **feedback** (👍/👎) to dynamically adjust recommendations.
agent_fallback.academic_link: 👉 Check out the **🎓 Academic Research** tab to explore the full corpus.
agent_fallback.academic_default: Check out the **🎓 Academic Research** tab to explore the corpus.
agent_fallback.compare_default: 🔀 Use the **🔀 Compare** tab to compare two books side-by-side.
agent_fallback.summary_prompt: For an in-depth thematic summary, enable LLM mode.
agent_fallback.summary_default: 📝 Mention book titles in the conversation so I can summarize their themes.
agent_fallback.general:
💡 I can help you with:

- 📊 Dataset **Statistics**
- 🏆 **Top** books and authors
- 📚 Book **Recommendations**
- 🔬 **Explanation** of the hybrid algorithm
- 🎓 **Academic research**
- 🔀 **Comparing** two books

Ask your question by mentioning one of these topics!
agent_fallback.rag_requires_llm: RAG mode requires an active language model (LLM). Please configure your API keys to use this mode.

academic.hero_subtitle: Explore our local selection and browse the Semantic Scholar database.

movies.hero_subtitle: Discover, search and get movie recommendations.

games.hero_subtitle: Discover, search and get video game recommendations.

cross_media.hero_subtitle: Based on a book of your choice, BookLens suggests movies and video games with similar themes.

arch.hero_subtitle: Discover all the bricks and APIs that power the BookLens project.
arch.hf_usage: Image cover generation (FLUX.1-dev) and speech synthesis (MMS-TTS).
arch.tmdb_usage: Real-time search, movie metadata, original posters, ratings and recommendations.
arch.rawg_usage: Video game search, screenshots, dev studios, publishers, platforms and suggestions.
arch.ol_usage: Enrichment of books with real data (ISBNs, covers, summaries, subjects).
arch.ss_usage: Academic paper search and critical synthesis on ecofeminism and Sci-Fi.
arch.gov_desc: BookLens applies strict auditing rules to clean, deduplicate, and validate the integrity of both local and remote sources.

dash_tech.hero_subtitle: Track API performance, response times and live structured logs.
dash_tech.no_data: No telemetry data available at the moment. Ask the AI Agent or browse the app to generate API calls.
dash_tech.live_logs: Live Logs - logs/app.log (15 last JSON entries)

library.hero_subtitle: Manage your scientific PDF documents and explore them semantically.
library.upload_help: Drag and drop PDF files here (max 20 MB per file)
library.no_docs: No documents indexed yet. Please upload PDFs above.
library.no_docs_search: Please add documents first to perform a search.
library.query_placeholder: Ask a question about your documents...
library.cloud_storage_warning: 💡 In cloud mode (Streamlit Community Cloud), uploaded documents are stored temporarily. They will be deleted on the next application restart. To index large volumes of documents persistently, run the project locally.

eval.hero_subtitle: Objectively measure agent, model, and RAG quality.
eval.info_text: The AI Evaluation Lab runs deterministic evaluation test runs against the agent's responses. The scores measure routing accuracy, RAG quality (valid citations), and software security.
eval.confirm_body: You are about to launch {count} real LLM requests. This will consume your NVIDIA or Hugging Face API quota. Do you confirm the launch?
eval.empty_results: No evaluation runs have been executed in this session.

mlops.hero_subtitle: Track model lifecycle, detect data drift, and retrain the recommender engine.
mlops.no_active_model: No model is currently marked active in the registry.
mlops.init_registry: Initialize registry with the current model
mlops.retrain_desc: Retraining analyzes the loaded dataset in memory and generates a new candidate model in the registry.
mlops.confirm_checkbox: I confirm that I want to trigger the model retraining locally.
mlops.promote_title: Promote a Specific Version to Production

recs.hero_subtitle: Select a book and discover suggestions based on collaborative filtering and content similarity.
recs.no_data: ❌ The model does not have enough data to make recommendations.
recs.how_it_works: 🔬 How does the hybrid model work?
recs.collab_desc: Compares books based on readers' ratings. Two books are similar if the same readers rated them similarly.
recs.content_desc: Compares books based on metadata (author, theme, description) via TF-IDF.
recs.feedback_desc: Your interactions (likes, dislikes, favorites, already read) adjust recommendation scores in real time.
recs.no_recs_filters: 📚 Not enough data to generate recommendations for this book with the current filters.
recs.cloud_storage_warning: 💡 In cloud mode (Streamlit Community Cloud), your personalization preferences are stored temporarily in your session and will reset when the application restarts. For permanent persistence, run the project locally.

security.status_desc: Below is the activation state of the external services integrated with the application. This section only indicates whether the key is configured or not (keys are never exposed).
